bio.hero: Fullstack developer specializing in AI chatbot platforms — integrated multiple social channels for enterprise clients. I leverage AI tools to ship faster and deliver end-to-end, from backend APIs to mobile apps.
aboutPreview: I build production systems end-to-end — from NestJS + GraphQL backends to React frontends and React Native mobile apps. At my current role, I develop AI chatbot platforms with multi-channel social integrations for enterprise clients.

I'm a fast learner who dives deep into new tech when the project needs it — from setting up Kubernetes staging environments to picking up React Native for mobile. Open to freelance and remote collaboration.
bio.full: Fullstack developer with 1+ year building AI chatbot platforms — NestJS + GraphQL backends, React/Next.js dashboards, React Native mobile apps. Integrated multiple social channels for enterprise clients. Previously led a 10-member intern team at FPT Software. Open to freelance, remote, and full-time opportunities.
bio.contact: Open to collaboration — freelance, remote, or full-time opportunities. Let's build something together.
